title: CreativePageJump
description: This mod allows you to edit the page number within creative inventory directly to switch to some tab page without clicking the switch button on and on.
body:
[简体中文](https://github.com/srcres258/CreativePageJump/blob/master/README-zh.md) # Description This mod allows you to directly edit the page number on the creative inventory to jump to the target page without clicking the page switch buttons for many times.
**Note that you can only use this mod on the client.** Attempting to add it to the dedicated server will result in a crash.
![Screenshot 1](https://raw.githubusercontent.com/srcres258/CreativePageJump/master/docs/ss1.png) # License This project is licensed under [GNU Lesser General Public License v3.0 only](https://spdx.org/licenses/LGPL-3.0-only.html).
